race.comment: MIDNIGHT STAR (6) is knocking on the door of a maiden win, finishing 0.6L off the winner last time out at Pinjarra when the race favourite. This looks to shape similarly today from a favourable barrier and CJP hops back on board. Can shed the maiden tag today with the rise in trip suiting. GOLD ENIGMA (7) never got into the race over 2000m last time out but was in better touch prior around this distance range. Nottle's 2kg claim comes in handy and she can be finishing off strongly. BEYOND THE LIMITS (4) beat MIDNIGHT STAR last start and that formline looks the one to follow in this event. MACHO ARQUERO (1) can be flying late in the race.
